hero_headline_scale: subtle — standard h1 size, nothing crazy
nav_style: minimal floating — small pill in corner
card_style: hover-to-reveal — minimal at rest, details on hover
scroll_animation: moderate — staggered entrance of cards and elements
border_radius: mixed — sharp sections with rounded cards
spacing_density: tight — compact, lots of content visible
quirk: navigation is vertical on the left side, not top
bonus_quirk: one section has an inverted color scheme compared to the rest
